周七麟穿越了。
为了能再穿回去，他耗时三年，拼着腰子报废的风险，终于成功攻略了30个极品女神。
眼看回归在即，系统却突然提示：
【哎呀，剧本加载错误。其实你是一本龙王文里的反派，死于男主之手，即可遣返回原世界。】
为了火速领盒饭，周七麟化身究极作死大反派！
狂扇龙王、主动把脸伸过去求龙王一拳爆头！
甚至开始调戏女主……
但是……为什么这些女主都是自己前女友啊！
高冷女总裁：“我就是要嫁给七麟，谁敢抢婚？”
女神医：“谁说这宝物是给你的？这是给麟哥哥的。”
男主美艳师傅：“徒儿，有我在，你放心！什么？对面是七麟？那你可以放心去死了。”
龙王：”？？？"
不是，这对吗？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oae48e38a43b54d6e25e15dec43b53398~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"天生五七","author_id":"","book_id":"7610384281822563352","book_name":"我是反派？可女主们是我前女友啊","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0b878","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":843,"name":"迪化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=843&name=迪化&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7610384486529778200","read_count":"93362","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"120856"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"57","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,多女主,反派,搞笑轻松,迪化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oae48e38a43b54d6e25e15dec43b53398~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779285102&x-signature=9sRSI8A3TchykXJeBo4pw%2BJoT20%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"50676088453","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"16"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603212151421E5E5C8630E282970577"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读38分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_cou
